title: Swinney considering ban on US military flights using Prestwick

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Swinney considering ban on US military flights using Prestwick. First Minister John Swinney says he could ban US military flights from using Prestwick Airport if they are linked to offensive operations...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Swinney considering ban on US military flights using Prestwick
